name: Screw Jam Puzzle
author: Poki
description: Screw Jam Puzzle is a vibrant puzzle game that challenges you to unscrew and match screws by color to clear the board. Navigate carefully around intricately shaped glass obstacles—one wrong move could jam everything! Collect screws from each completed level to construct a stunning city filled with spectacular monuments. Can you master every twist and build your ultimate metropolis? How do I play Screw Jam Puzzle? Use your mouse to click on the different colored screws, collect all the screws to complete the level! Who created Screw Jam Puzzle? Screw Jam Puzzle is created by PEGASUS. Play their other games on Poki: Cat Gunner: Super Zombie Shoot , Chaotic War 3 , How to loot - Pin pull , Shark.io , Stickman Dragon Fight , Stickman Escape , and Stickman Go ! How can I play Screw Jam Puzzle for free? You can play Screw Jam Puzzle for free on Poki. Can I play Screw Jam Puzzle on mobile devices and desktop? Screw Jam Puzzle can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
